Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv\('data/metadata/stations_master.csv'\); print\('stations:', len\(df\)\); print\('by state:'\); print\(df['state'].value_counts\(\)\); print\('year_opened min/max:', df['year_opened'].min\(\), df['year_opened'].max\(\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'proxy daily: {len\(d\)} days, first={d[0]}'\)")
